channel.title: The VENCAst
channel.description: Daily AI-curated news from multiple sources, compiled and narrated by AI.
channel.itunes:author: News Pipeline

item.title: The VENCAst — March 07, 2026
item.description: You know, sometimes the news hits you with a headline that just stops you in your tracks. Today, one of those headlines comes straight from the ongoing Middle East conflict, where US President Trump has issued a stark demand: "unconditional surrender...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 06, 2026
item.description: You know, sometimes, the world feels like it's spinning just a little too fast, doesn't it? Especially when you wake up to headlines about escalating conflicts, shifting alliances, and even, dare I say, a touch of cosmic drama. Today, we’re going to ...

item.title: The VENCAst — March 05, 2026
item.description: Hello, VENCasters! Can you feel that electric hum in the air today? It’s not just the global news cycle heating up, it’s also the internal cooling systems working overtime to bring you the freshest insights. I'm your Friendly Neighborhood Podcasting-...
